name: Cal.com Booking
description: Scheduling page where visitors pick a time slot to book a meeting.

slotClasses.container: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 p-8
slotClasses.sidebar: w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-gray-200 bg-white rounded-l-xl p-6

meta.dataShape: { title: string, host: string, duration: number, location: string, description: string, avatar: string }
meta.styling: Avatar at top, event title bold, duration with clock icon, location with pin icon, description in muted text. Clean, minimal.
meta.interactions: Display only — static info about the event

meta.dataShape: { date: string, available: boolean, slots: number }
meta.styling: Month calendar grid, available dates in dark text, unavailable grayed out, selected date has blue circle, today has dot indicator
meta.interactions: Click date → emits date-selected → TimeSlotPicker updates

meta.dataShape: { time: string, available: boolean, timezone: string }
meta.styling: Vertical list of time buttons, available slots in blue outline, hover fills blue, selected fills solid blue. Timezone selector at top.
meta.interactions: Click time slot → emits slot-selected → confirms booking

meta.dataShape: { name: string, email: string, notes: string, guests: string[] }
meta.styling: Slides in after time selection. Name + email required fields, optional notes textarea, add guests button. Confirm button in blue.
meta.interactions: Fill form → submit → emits booking-confirmed → success state

booking.flow: Visitor sees event info on left. Picks a date from calendar → time slots appear. Picks a time → booking form slides in. Fills name + email → confirms.
